src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without the new namespace.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace fastjson JSONUtil with internal JsonUtil for serialization.
Add log level checks to prevent unnecessary object construction when logging is disabled.
Replace direct request.getRemoteHost() with a utility method for IP address extraction.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation.
Remove the entire AuthorizationServerConfiguration class that relied on the deprecated spring-security-oauth2 library, which is incompatible with Spring Security 5+ and Java 17.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The class AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter and the package org.springframework.security.oauth2.config.annotation.web.configuration were removed in Spring Security 5. Using them causes a compile error (class not found) on JDK 17 with modern Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: The entire AccessConfirmationController class was removed (commented out) as part of the migration away from spring-security-oauth2.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The class depends on org.springframework.security.oauth2.provider.AuthorizationRequest and ClientDetailsService, which are removed in the migration to Spring Authorization Server/Spring Security 5.x. Without removal, the code fails to compile due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; running on Java 8 or with old Spring dependencies causes classpath and compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.5 mandates Java 17; compiling with Java 8 settings will result in missing class errors or incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy spring-security-oauth2 library with the new Spring Authorization Server.
pom.xml.why_exists: The legacy spring-security-oauth2 is deprecated and incompatible with Spring Security 6 (used in Boot 3); code using the old API will fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit spring-boot-starter-logging dependency as it is included by default in spring-boot-starter.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa for database persistence support.
Add liquibase-core for database schema migration management.
Update MySQL connector artifact ID to the new naming convention for MySQL 8+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID is deprecated/removed in newer versions; using it may lead to dependency resolution failures or runtime driver issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-security to enable Spring Security features.
Add jackson-datatype-jsr310 for Java 8+ date/time type serialization support.
Add Lombok to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add Apache Commons Text for string manipulation utilities.
Add MapStruct for type-safe bean mapping.
Add a custom captcha library dependency.
Add spring-boot-starter-cache to enable caching abstraction.
Add Caffeine as the caching provider implementation.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 17 and annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit Java 17 source/target and annotation processor paths, the project will fail to compile due to missing generated code (Lombok/MapStruct) or incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-resources-plugin to prevent filtering of binary files like fonts and keystores.
Add versions-maven-plugin to help manage dependency updates.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add explicit server port and context path configuration.
Configure the size of the task scheduling pool.
Configure file-based logging with path and history retention.
Enable and configure Tomcat access logs.
Update MySQL JDBC driver class to the new com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver required for MySQL 8.0+ and newer Connector/J versions.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The old com.mysql.jdbc.Driver is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or runtime warnings/errors.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add datasource URL, credentials, and HikariCP configuration.
Add JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
Enable Liquibase for database schema migration.
Add application-specific configuration for signin, JWT, captcha, oauth2, dozer, and third-party integrations.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.after:
signin.failure.max=5
jwt.jks.keypass=keypass
signIn.captcha=false
oauth2.issuer-uri=http://server.sso.com
captcha.max.times=5
dozer.mapping-files=classpath:dozer/mapper.xml
thirdparty.weixin.mini.appid=
thirdparty.weixin.mini.secret=

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap 4.0.0 Grid CSS with Bootstrap 5.2.3 Grid CSS to adopt modern CSS variables and remove IE11 vendor prefixes.
